name: CARLISLE COMPANIES INC
summary: Carlisle Companies Incorporated is a leading supplier of innovative building envelope products and solutions for energy-efficient buildings. Operating through two segments, Carlisle Construction Materials (CCM) and Carlisle Weatherproofing Technologies (CWT), the company manufactures and supplies commercial roofing systems including EPDM, TPO, PVC membranes, polyiso insulation, architectural metals, waterproofing products, air and vapor barriers, spray polyurethane foam, and expanded polystyrene insulation, primarily for U.S. and European commercial and residential construction markets.

products.name: EPDM Roofing Membranes
products.description: Single-ply ethylene propylene diene monomer roofing membranes sold under Carlisle SynTec, Versico, Weatherbond, Resitrix and Hertalan brands.

products.name: TPO Roofing Membranes
products.description: Thermoplastic polyolefin single-ply roofing membranes for commercial construction markets.

products.name: PVC Roofing Membranes
products.description: Polyvinyl chloride single-ply roofing membranes for commercial and building applications.

products.name: Polyisocyanurate Insulation
products.description: Polyiso insulation sold in warranted and non-warranted systems for commercial roofing.

products.name: Architectural Metal Roofing
products.description: Architectural metal and roof garden systems for commercial construction markets.

products.name: Hunter Panels
products.description: Roofing insulation products sold under the Hunter Panels brand in the United States.

products.name: Waterproofing and Moisture Protection Products
products.description: High-performance waterproofing products for the building envelope under the CWT segment.

products.name: Air and Vapor Barriers
products.description: Integrated air and vapor barrier systems for building envelope construction projects.

products.name: Spray Polyurethane Foam Systems
products.description: Spray polyurethane foam and coating systems for building envelope insulation and protection.

products.name: Expanded Polystyrene Insulation
products.description: Block-molded expanded polystyrene and other insulation products for the building envelope.

products.name: Protective Roofing Underlayments
products.description: Protective roofing underlayments for residential and commercial building construction.
